title: Arbolín's-Koopas Kindom
description: It's a mod inspired by the world of Super Mario Bros. I hope you like it.
body:
**Koopa's Kingdom for Minecraft**

Koopa's Kingdom brings the excitement and nostalgia of the Mushroom Kingdom into Minecraft, introducing a new dimension, unique power-ups, blocks, and formidable enemies inspired by the Mario Bros. universe. Get ready to explore this iconic world and face fresh challenges!

**Features**

**Dimension**

forgotten Dimension: Step into a custom dimension filled with the atmosphere and peril of the Mushroom Kingdom. Discover unique resources, blocks, and dangerous encounters awaiting brave adventurers.

**Blocks**

assorted blocks: Decorative blocks inspired by Mario Bros., ideal for constructing castles and dungeons that bring the Mushroom Kingdom to life.

surprise block: A special block that triggers unique effects, capturing the spirit of the iconic power-up blocks from Mario games.

**Items and Power-ups**

Red Mushroom: Provides additional hearts when consumed, acting as a health boost similar to the classic Mario power-up.

Green Mushroom: Handle with caution! Consuming this mushroom applies a poison effect, adding an element of risk.

Super Star: Grants temporary invincibility, allowing players to face foes without taking damage.

Fire Flower: Grants the player the ability to shoot fireballs, a powerful ranged attack inspired by Mario’s classic ability to defeat enemies from afar.

**Entities**

Mario Zombie (Mini-boss): A powerful undead version of Mario. This mini-boss presents a challenging encounter and awaits daring players in the Koopa Dimension.

Poisonous Mushroom: A hostile entity that explodes upon contact, releasing a poisonous effect that harms nearby players.

Koopa's Kingdom is ideal for players who want to relive the magic of the Mushroom Kingdom in Minecraft, with nostalgic elements and thrilling challenges. Enter this unique world to explore, fight, and power up in true Mario style!

**Is in progres.**
